title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report — AIAgent_05_2026
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training course 'AI Agent & LLM Application Development' was completed with a high attendance rate of 90.4% and a perfect completion rate of 100%. The overall pass rate stands at 92.3%, with an average score of 7.88 out of 10. Despite these positive metrics, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk, indicating potential areas for improvement.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has the strongest effectiveness score (89.47) in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag was triggered.
The feedback rating of 4.73 out of 5 suggests that the course content was well-received, yet the effectiveness score of 89.47 indicates room for enhancement in training delivery or content.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.

Additionally, a review of the course content and delivery methods should be conducted to address the effectiveness classification marked as Risk, ensuring that all trainees achieve the desired learning outcomes.

checklist.detail: Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sheets were mapped to simulated sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count × total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one assessment/pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID, trainee ID, period
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededTrainees.reason: Below pass threshold or attendance below 70%

supportNeededGroups.reason: At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.
